prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the regulation of a social housing provider in the UK, which includes Scotland as part of the broader housing and governance standards governed by UK regulations. The standards set by regulators aim to ensure compliance and quality across all UK nations, including Scotland.
